_comment: BlueMeta Technologies scoring profile (scorer.CapabilityProfile). Derived from config/bluemeta_profile.yaml. This is the REAL company profile the Scorer and Writer ground on — distinct from the generic test/fixtures/capability_profile.json. Keep in sync with config/bluemeta_profile.yaml.
past_performance: U.S. Census Bureau: built SpeakEase, an AI-powered multilingual communications platform for local governments (2024 Opportunity Project Sprint partnership) — proves federal experience, AI/ML, multilingual systems, and accessible public-facing design

Justice40 Initiative (Federal): developed a federal funding-tracking tool surfacing investment flows to disadvantaged communities — proves federal data integration, data visualization, and compliance-minded public reporting

Bullard Center for Environmental Justice (Texas Southern University): enhanced the federal Climate and Economic Justice Screening Tool (CEJST) with demographic data layers — proves GIS/geospatial, API development, and database engineering on a government-facing application
Center for Community Engagement, Environmental Justice, and Health (CEEJH): delivered MyBlockCounts, an iOS/Android geospatial data-collection app — proves mobile development and cloud integration
ByBlack: fintech platform with Plaid banking integration across 12,000+ institutions and AI merchant categorization, delivered in 8 weeks — proves scalable secure delivery, PCI compliance, and AI/ML
Baltimore City Board of School Commissioners: automated data-entry system for meeting logs and budgeting — proves government experience and data automation
